bookSourceComment:
version:1.3
last_updateTime:2025.11.3
支持所有漫画，小说，听书，短剧
小说可下载，听书支持切换音色
待开发：①段评显示
感谢@知秋大佬的书源规则支持
/*
搜索模式默认是搜小说
需要漫画则在关键字前加m:即m:系统
小说则为n:系统
听书则为t:系统 （该模式为真人听书）
短剧则为d:系统
使用该搜索方式后，需要登录自行切换至小说模式
*/

ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
t = Map('自定义音色：') ? Map('自定义音色：') : source.get('tone');
source.put('tone',t)
result
</js>
data
ruleBookInfo.name: book_name

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var id = java.hexDecodeToString(result);
var type = source.get('type');
var tone = source.get('tone');

let url = source.key + "content?item_id=" + id + "&type=" + type;
let url1 = source.key + "page?item_id=" + id
if (type == 'novel'||type == '') {
	let result = java.ajax(url);
  result=JSON.parse(result).content;
} else if (type == 'comic') {
  let result = java.ajax(url);
  result=JSON.parse(result).content;
} else if (type == 'audio'||type == 'novelaudio') {
	let urls = url + "&tone_id=" + tone;
	java.log(urls)
  let result = java.ajax(urls);
  result=JSON.parse(result).content;
  if (result==''){java.longToast('该书不支持当前音色，请更换并刷新');result}
} else if (type == 'video') {
  if (book['durChapterIndex'] == chapter['index']) {
    java.startBrowser(url1, '播放器')
    java.toast('\n✅正在加载视频，请耐心等待')
  }
  `【刷新正文】播放视频\n`
  }
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.author||$.copyright
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let tp = (baseUrl.match(/genre_type=(\d)/) || [, '0'])[1];
source.put('tp',tp)
function getBookIdFull(url) {
	const {java} = this
	$ = JSON.parse(url).data
	if ($.book_shelf_info != 0 && $.book_shelf_info != undefined) {
		arr = $.book_shelf_info.map($ => $.book_id)
	} else if (list = $.data_list != 0 && $.data_list != undefined)  {
		arr = $.data_list.map($ => $.book_id_str)
	} else {
		java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！")
	}
	return arr
}
let ck = "sessionid=" + (String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) ? String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) : (source.getLoginInfoMap() ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {})['手动登录Token'])

getShelf = () => {
let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'
let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
  headers: {
    'Cookie': ck
  }
}))

let arrB = []
for (let i of JSON.parse(book_shelf_info).data.book_shelf_info) {
  arrB.push(i.book_id)
}
write_config('bookshelf.' + read_config('userinfo.userid'), arrB)

bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100)
let urls = []
id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(source.key + "/multi-detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
})

res = java.ajaxAll(urls)
let resp = {book_info: []}
res.forEach(r => {
  resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
})

return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'

  let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
    headers: {
      'Cookie': ck,
    }
  })))
  let group_bookids = {
    "组外": []
  }
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "组外"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "组外"].push(i.book_id)
  })
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["组外"]))
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name))
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
  //java.log("awa")
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100)
  let urls = []

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(source.key + "/multi-detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
  })
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

  let resp = {book_info: []}
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
  })

  return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
	  "bookmall/tab",
    "version_name=5.8.9.32",
	  null,
	  ck
  )
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
  let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
  if (!tab) tab = []
  let bookList = []
  for (let i of tab) {
    bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(i.book_data))
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/")
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
  } else result = JSON.parse(result)
}


JSON.stringify({
  data: result.book_list || result.book_info || result.data.result ||
        result.data.book_info || result.detail_list || result.data
});

</js>
$..video_info[*]||$..book_data[*]||$.data[*]

if (String(tp) == ''||tp == '6'){

		}else if (tp == '3'){

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var id = java.hexDecodeToString(result);
var type = getArguments('type');
let tone = getArguments('tone_id');
java.log(tone)
try {
	let tone_id = source.getLoginInfoMap()['听书Ai音色填写详情页序号'];
  if (tone_id!='') {
  	tone = String(tone_id)
  	}
} catch (e) {}

let url = source.key + "/api/content?item_id=" + id;
if (type == 'comic') {
	  let result = java.ajax(url+"&tab=漫画");
	  result=JSON.parse(result).data.images;
  } else if (type == 'audio') {
	let urls = url +"&tab=听书" + "&tone_id=" + tone;
	java.log(urls);
  let result = java.ajax(urls);
  result=JSON.parse(result).data.content;
} else if (type == 'video') {
	//let urls = url +"&tab=短剧";
  //let result = java.ajax(urls);
  //result=JSON.parse(result).data.video_url;

  if (book['durChapterIndex'] == chapter['index']) {
   	let bookid = java.get('bookid');  	 
  	let vurl = source.key+"/video?book_id="+bookid;
    java.startBrowser(vurl, '短剧播放器') ;   
    java.toast('\n✅正在加载视频，请耐心等待');
  }
  `【刷新正文】播放视频\n`
  } else {
  let result = java.ajax(url+"&tab=小说");
  result=JSON.parse(result).data.content;
  	}
</js>

  }
}))

bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100)
let urls = []
id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
})

res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

let resp = {book_info: []}
res.forEach(r => {
  resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
})

return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'

  let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
    headers: {
      'Cookie': ck,
    }
  })))
  let group_bookids = {
    "未分组": []
  }
  // java.log(
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
  })
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["未分组"]))
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name))
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
  //java.log("awa")
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100)
  let urls = []

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
  })
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

  let resp = {book_info: []}
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
  })

  return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = xGorgon(
	  "bookmall/tab",
    "version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048",
	  null,
	  ck
  )
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
  let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index]
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(tab))
  tab = tab.cell_data
  if (!tab) tab = []
  let bookList = []
  for (let i of tab) {
    bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(i.book_data))
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/")
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
  } else result = JSON.parse(result)
}
JSON.stringify({data: result.book_info || result.data.book_info || result.detail_list || result.data.video_info || result.data})
</js>

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
// 解析传递的参数
var params;
try {
    // 从base64解码获取参数
    var base64Str = java.hexDecodeToString(result);
    params = JSON.parse(base64Str);
} catch (e) {
    // 如果解析失败，使用默认值
    params = {
        book_id: java.get('book_id'),
        item_id: result,
        source: getArgument('source') || '番茄',
        tab: getArgument('tab') || '小说',
        tone_id: getArgument('tone_id') || '0'
    };
}

var bookId = params.book_id;
var itemId = params.item_id;
var sourceVal = params.source;
var tabVal = params.tab;
var toneId = params.tone_id || '0';

// 获取服务器地址
var server = getArgument('server') || host[0];

// 根据tab类型处理
if(tabVal == '视频'){
    // 视频类型
    var url = server + '/content?book_id=' + bookId + '&source=' + sourceVal + '&tab=' + tabVal + '&player=y';
    java.startBrowser(url, "");
    result = '刷新正文播放';
}else{
    // 小说、听书、漫画类型
    var url = server + '/content?book_id=' + bookId + '&item_id=' + itemId + '&source=' + sourceVal + '&tab=' + tabVal;
    
    // 如果是听书，添加音色参数
    if(tabVal == '有声') {
        url += '&tone_id=' + toneId;
    }
    
    var response = java.ajax(url);
    var json = JSON.parse(response);
    result = json.data && json.data[0] && json.data[0].content || '加载失败';
}
</js>

ruleBookInfo.downloadUrls:
<js>
if(baseUrl.indexOf('read')>-1){
	url = book.origin + '/' +java.getString("@@.readcontent@a@href")
	html = java.ajax(url)
	result = html.match(/var downloadurl = "([\s\S]+?)";/)[1]
}else{
	url = baseUrl.replace(/.*-(\d+).*/, "https://www.527txt.com/txt-xx/softdownfree.asp?softid=$1&ckm=mianfei")
	html = java.ajax(url)
	java.setContent(html)
	result = java.getString("@@text.第一下载地址(首选)@href")
}
</js>

bookSourceComment:
自己花了差不多一下午做出来的，第一次做的书源。特此发出来给自己纪念一下，也不算是完全自己做的吧。这个书源之前有大佬做了一下那个发现，只做了一个那个最新那个列表，其他的都是我看着关耳大佬的视频和那个规则自己一边抄一边写下来的。那个发现列表里面的那些规则是我把直接把源代码给了AI之后，然后再给他那个格式，让他照着格式给我写出来的！还有那个搜索，不知道为啥我做到一半之前好好的，然后突然又搜不出来了，可能之前的大佬也是因为搜不出来所以就没有做搜索那个规则吧？我自己照着关耳大佬的视频抄的不知道什么时候失效，失效了也不要找我，因为我真的是个小白，我也不会改。
                                        ——特此纪念
                                   ——by.Lai

searchUrl:
<js> 
//注意：一般网站默认首页(即baseUrl)有搜索框，否则请填入搜索页面地址
var url = baseUrl;
if (!baseUrl.match(/^https?:/i)) {
    java.log('\n\n\n\n‼️请填入正确的Url‼️\n\n\n\n');
}
var html = java.ajax(url + ",{'webView': true}");
//java.log(html);
var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html);
var form = doc.select('form[action]:not([name~=login]):not([class~=login]):not([id~=login])')[0];
//java.log(form);
var method = form.attr('method');
var action = form.attr('action');
var charset = doc.select('head>meta[charset]').attr('charset');
if (charset == '')
{
    charset = String(doc.select('head>meta[content~=charset=]').attr('content')).replace(/^.*charset=([a-z0-9\-]+).*$/i, 
    '$1');
}
//java.log(method);
//java.log(action);
//java.log(charset);
//桌面版UA
var uaw = "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36";
//手机版UA
var uam = "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 7.0; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/48.0.2564.116 Mobile Safari/537.36 T7/10.3 SearchCraft/2.6.2 (baiduboxapp; P1 7.0)";
var headers = {
    //请自行选择UA，↓↓↓填入此处
    "User-Agent" : uam, "Referer" : String(baseUrl)
};
url = baseUrl.replace(/([^\/])$/i, '$1/') + String(action).replace(/^\//, '');
var body = '';
var option = {};
var sk = form.select('input[name][type="text"],input[name][class="text"]').attr('name');
//java.log(sk);
var es = form.select('input[name]:not([type="submit"])');
for (var it in es)
{
    var e = es[it];
    var k = e.attr('name');
    var v = e.attr('value');
    if (k == sk) {
        //body+=sk+'={{java.encodeURI(key,\''+ charset+'\');}}&';
        body += sk + '={{key}}&';
    }
    else {
        body += k + '=' + v + '&';
    }
}
es = form.select('select[name]');
for (it in es)
{
    var e = es[it];
    var k = e.attr('name');
    var v = e.select('option')[0].attr('value');
    body += k + '=' + v + '&';
}
body = String(body).replace(/&$/, '');
java.log(body);
if (method.match(/post/i))
{
    option = 
    {
        "charset" : String(charset), "method" : String(method), "body" : String(body), "headers" : headers, 
        "webView" : true 
    };
    url += ',' + JSON.stringify(option);
}
else
{
    //get
    option = {
        "charset" : String(charset), "headers" : headers, "webView" : true 
    };
    url += '?' + body + ',' + JSON.stringify(option);
}
java.log(url);
</js>

var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));

	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, ''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + og('description').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('url'),
};
book;
</js>

searchUrl:
<js> 
//注意：一般网站默认首页(即baseUrl)有搜索框，否则请填入搜索页面地址
var url = baseUrl;
if (!baseUrl.match(/^https?:/i)) {
    java.log('\n\n\n\n‼️请填入正确的Url‼️\n\n\n\n');
}
var html = java.ajax(url + ",{'webView': true}");
//java.log(html);
var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html);
var form = doc.select('form[action]:not([name~=login]):not([class~=login]):not([id~=login])')[0];
//java.log(form);
var method = form.attr('method');
var action = form.attr('action');
var charset = doc.select('head>meta[charset]').attr('charset');
if (charset == '')
{
    charset = String(doc.select('head>meta[content~=charset=]').attr('content')).replace(/^.*charset=([a-z0-9\-]+).*$/i, 
    '$1');
}
//java.log(method);
//java.log(action);
//java.log(charset);
//桌面版UA
var uaw = "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36";
//手机版UA
var uam = "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 7.0; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/48.0.2564.116 Mobile Safari/537.36 T7/10.3 SearchCraft/2.6.2 (baiduboxapp; P1 7.0)";
var headers = {
    //请自行选择UA，↓↓↓填入此处
    "User-Agent" : uam, "Referer" : String(baseUrl)
};
url = baseUrl.replace(/([^\/])$/i, '$1/') + String(action).replace(/^\//, '');
var body = '';
var option = {};
var sk = form.select('input[name][type="text"],input[name][class="text"]').attr('name');
//java.log(sk);
var es = form.select('input[name]:not([type="submit"])');
for (var it in es)
{
    var e = es[it];
    var k = e.attr('name');
    var v = e.attr('value');
    if (k == sk) {
        //body+=sk+'={{java.encodeURI(key,\''+ charset+'\');}}&';
        body += sk + '={{key}}&';
    }
    else {
        body += k + '=' + v + '&';
    }
}
es = form.select('select[name]');
for (it in es)
{
    var e = es[it];
    var k = e.attr('name');
    var v = e.select('option')[0].attr('value');
    body += k + '=' + v + '&';
}
body = String(body).replace(/&$/, '');
java.log(body);
if (method.match(/post/i))
{
    option = 
    {
        "charset" : String(charset), "method" : String(method), "body" : String(body), "headers" : headers, 
        "webView" : true 
    };
    url += ',' + JSON.stringify(option);
}
else
{
    //get
    option = {
        "charset" : String(charset), "headers" : headers, "webView" : true 
    };
    url += '?' + body + ',' + JSON.stringify(option);
}
java.log(url);
</js>
